Off Calendar Jan-31-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT DEMANDFORCE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings; Alternative Request For Statement Of Decision.

Defendant's DemandForce, Inc's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is off calendar as moot in light of the filing of a first amended complaint by plaintiff Jihwan Kim seeking PAGA penalties only and defendant's notice of withdrawal of the motion dated Jan. 24, 2019.
